---
title: "Lectures & Labs"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Course Playlist
[YouTube Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLftoLyLEwECBg6Rs3JnMAJCSwYcr3Xq1r)
:::

```{=html}
<div class="legend">
<span class="legend-chip chip-lec">Lecture</span>
<span class="legend-chip chip-lab">Lab</span>
<span class="legend-chip chip-hol">Holiday</span>
</div>
<p class="schedule-note"><em>Lab sessions run twice a week (Tuesday &amp; Friday) with the same content across both days.</em></p>
```

## Schedule

<table class="schedule-table">
<thead>
<tr><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>#</th><th>Topic</th><th>Materials</th><th>Recording</th></tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>7 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>1</td><td>Data Collection</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week01-data-collection-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week01-data-collection-lecture.pdf) · [API Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/Nipun/api-testing)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W76ktQa7BB8)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>9 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>1</td><td>Data Collection Lab</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week01-data-collection-lab.html)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>10 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>2</td><td>Data Collection continued (HTML parsing)</td><td>[DOM Viewer](https://nipunbatra.github.io/dom-tree-viewer/)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g07rDAr7ueY)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td></td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>3</td><td>Data Validation</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week02-data-validation-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week02-data-validation-lecture.pdf)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8_pptikTX0g)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>13 & 16 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>4</td><td>Data Validation Lab</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week02-data-validation-lab.html)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-hol"><td>14 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-hol">Holiday</span></td><td></td><td><em>Uttarayan / Makar Sankranti</em></td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>16 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>4</td><td>Data Labeling</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week03-data-labeling-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week03-data-labeling-lecture.pdf)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vESABn1eAOI)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>27 & 30 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>5</td><td>Data Labeling Lab (+ challenge: build a mini Label Studio)</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week03-data-labeling-lab.html)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>28 Jan</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>5</td><td>Optimizing Data Labeling: Active Learning, Weak Supervision & LLMs</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week04-optimizing-labeling-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week04-optimizing-labeling-lecture.pdf)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sw_aqSIWBZc)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>3 & 10 Feb</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>6</td><td>Optimizing Labeling Lab (Active Learning + Weak Supervision)</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week04-optimizing-labeling-lab.html)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>4 Feb</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>6</td><td>Data Augmentation</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week05-data-augmentation-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week05-data-augmentation-lecture.pdf)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=32bknvkw60o)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>11 Feb</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>7</td><td>LLM APIs & Multimodal AI</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week06-llm-apis-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week06-llm-apis-lecture.pdf)</td><td>[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EAUBdpXARbY)</td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>13 Feb</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>7</td><td>Quiz 1 paper review (held in lab slot)</td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>17 Feb</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>8</td><td>Data Augmentation + LLM APIs Lab</td><td>[Data Aug HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week05-data-augmentation-lab.html) · [LLM APIs HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week06-llm-apis-lab.html)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-hol"><td>20 Feb – 8 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-hol">Break</span></td><td></td><td><em>Mid-sem Examination I (Feb 20 – 27) + Mid-semester Recess (Feb 28 – Mar 8)</em></td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>10 & 13 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>9</td><td>Assignment 3 worktime (Q3 resumption)</td><td>[Assignment 3](https://github.com/jsmaskeen/STTAI-Assignment-3)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>11 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>8</td><td>Model Evaluation: Cross-Validation, Bias-Variance</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week07-model-development-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week07-model-development-lecture.pdf)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>17 & 20 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>10</td><td>Cross-Validation Lab (sklearn + from scratch)</td><td>[Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week07-cross-validation-lab.ipynb) · [GitHub](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week07-cross-validation-lab.ipynb)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>18 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>9</td><td>Tuning, AutoML & Experiment Tracking</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week08-tuning-tracking-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week08-tuning-tracking-lecture.pdf)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>24 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>11</td><td>Hyperparameter Tuning Lab (Grid / Random / Optuna)</td><td>[Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week08-hyperparameter-tuning-lab.ipynb) · [GitHub](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week08-hyperparameter-tuning-lab.ipynb)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>25 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>10</td><td>Reproducibility: Docker, Seeds & Tracking</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week09-reproducibility-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week09-reproducibility-lecture.pdf) · [Docker Demos](https://github.com/nipunbatra/docker-ml-demos)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>27 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>12</td><td>Reproducibility Lab (Docker + Seeds + TrackIO)</td><td>[Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week09-reproducibility-lab.ipynb) · [GitHub](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week09-reproducibility-lab.ipynb)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-hol"><td>31 Mar</td><td><span class="tag-hol">Holiday</span></td><td></td><td><em>Mahavir Jayanti (also last day of Q3)</em></td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>1 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>11</td><td>Data Drift & Model Monitoring <small>(Q4 begins)</small></td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week10-data-drift-lecture.html) · [Notebook](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/lecture-demos/week10/data_drift_notebook.html)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-hol"><td>3 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-hol">Holiday</span></td><td></td><td><em>Good Friday</em></td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>7 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>13</td><td>Data Drift demo + Assignment 4 streamlit/deployment demo</td><td>[Notebook](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/lecture-demos/week10/data_drift_notebook.html) · [Companions](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/tree/master/lecture-demos/week10)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>8 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>12</td><td>Profiling & Quantization</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week11-profiling-quantization-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week11-profiling-quantization-lecture.pdf) · [Colab Notebooks](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/tree/master/lecture-demos/week11/colab-notebooks)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>10 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>14</td><td>Profiling & Quantization Lab</td><td>[Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week11-profiling-quantization-lab.ipynb) · [GitHub](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/labs/week11-profiling-quantization-lab.ipynb)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-hol"><td>14 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-hol">Holiday</span></td><td></td><td><em>Ambedkar Jayanti</em></td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>15 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>13</td><td>Building AI Agents from Scratch</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week12-agents-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week12-agents-lecture.pdf) · [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/lecture-demos/week12/colab-notebooks/01-agents-from-scratch.ipynb)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-hol"><td>17 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-hol">Viva</span></td><td></td><td><em>Assignment 4 viva (lab slot used for viva, not a lab)</em></td><td></td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lab"><td>21 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lab">Lab</span></td><td>15</td><td>AI Agents Lab (incl. advanced NumPy-aware calculator exercise)</td><td>[Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/lecture-demos/week12/colab-notebooks/01-agents-from-scratch.ipynb) · [GitHub](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/lecture-demos/week12/colab-notebooks/01-agents-from-scratch.ipynb)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr class="row-lec"><td>22 Apr</td><td><span class="tag-lec">Lecture</span></td><td>14</td><td>Course Summary & What's Next</td><td>[HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week13-course-summary-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week13-course-summary-lecture.pdf)</td><td></td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Additional Content (covered in labs)

| Type | Topic | Materials |
|------|-------|-----------|
| Lab | From Script to Web App | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week10-web-apps-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week10-web-apps-lecture.pdf) |
| Lab | CI/CD & Automation | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week11-cicd-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week11-cicd-lecture.pdf) |
| Lab | APIs & Demos | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week12-apis-lecture.html) · [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week12-apis-lecture.pdf) |
:::
